data.title: ConnectM acquires Green Energy Gains
data.description:
• ConnectM Technology Solutions (NASDAQ:CNTM) on Thursday said it has signed an agreement to acquire all the issued and outstanding capital stock of Green Energy Gains (GEG) in an all-stock transaction.
  • The deal marks ConnectM's second strategic acquisition since its public listing in July 2024.
  • Green Energy Gains is a home performance contractor working in partnership with the sponsors of the Mass Save Program. Its operating model includes home energy assessments (HEA) and modeling, and identification of weatherization opportunities for the home in order to reduce the homeowner's utility bills.
  • The acquisition serves as an entry point for the HEA flywheel, providing whole home electrification solutions, and unlocks the world of rebates and incentives for electrification, the company said in its press statement.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Dave & Buster's shares buoyed by insider purchases
data.description:
• Shares of Dave & Buster’s Entertainment (NASDAQ:PLAY) are more than 2% higher in Thursday’s premarket as the company’s CEO Christopher Morris made several purchases of the company’s stock earlier in the week.
  • According to several filings with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, Morris, along with several other company insiders, made several large purchases of stock within a two-day period.

data.title: Freight Technologies regains compliance with Nasdaq
data.description:
• Freight Technologies (NASDAQ:FRGT) said it has received written notice from the Nasdaq, stating that the company has regained compliance with the minimum bid price requirement.
  • Press Release

data.title: Kandi Technologies announces changes to board of directors and senior management team
data.description:
• Kandi Technologies Group (NASDAQ:KNDI) has announced that Mr. Xiaoming Hu has resigned as Chairman of the Board after decades of dedicated service.
  • Mr. Hu will remain on the Board as a Director, offering valuable insight as he transitions toward retirement.
  • Following careful consideration, the Board elected Dr. Xueqin Dong as Chairman, effective immediately.
  • The Co. also appointed Mr. Feng Chen as CEO, effective Oct. 6, 2024.
  • On Oct. 6, 2024, Kandi’s Board of Directors also approved a series of strategic initiatives as part of its broader mission to drive innovation in the all-electric off-road vehicle and mobility sectors.

data.title: Five9 expands its footprints in India
data.description:
• Five9 (NASDAQ:FIVN) said it has expanded its footprints in India, after the addition of two new Five9 Data Centers in Delhi and Mumbai.
  • The firm added, it has also achieved Department of Telecommunications Unified License licensing to provide Access Services, National Long Distance and International Long Distance in India.

data.title: SolarBank to develop 3.7MW solar project in New York
data.description:
• SolarBank (NASDAQ:SUUN) on Thursday announced its plans to develop a 3.7MW DC ground-mount solar power project in Seneca County, New York.
  • The project, for which an interconnection study is already underway, is expected to be eligible for incentives under the New York State Energy Research and Development Authority NY-Sun Program.
  • Shares of SolarBank (SUUN) were up +3.19% premarket
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: TransUnion raised to Outperform at Wolfe on 'conservative' guidance
data.description:
TransUnion (NYSE:TRU) stock gained 1.1% in Thursday premarket trading after Wolfe Research upgraded the consumer credit reporting agency to Outperform from Peer Perform.

The company's conservative guidance paves the way for "beat and raise potential," analyst Scott Wurtzel wrote in a note.

That, in addition to a potential recovery in mortgage volumes in 2025 and 2026, are set to drive (TRU) shares and estimates higher, he added.

"With interest rates coming down, we believe mortgage volumes may begin to recover as we move into 2025." TransUnion's (TRU) mortgage exposure reflects 9% of its revenue.

His Outperform rate aligns with the SA Quant system rating of Strong Buy and the average Wall Street analyst rating of Buy.

data.title: Paychex declares $0.98 dividend
data.description:
• Paychex (NASDAQ:PAYX) declared $0.98/share quarterly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Forward yield 2.8%
  • Payable Nov. 27; for shareholders of record Nov. 7; ex-div Nov. 7.
  • See PAYX Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Allarity regains compliance with NASDAQ minimum bid price requirement
data.description:
• Allarity Therapeutics (NASDAQ:ALLR) has announced that on Oct. 9, 2024, the Co. has regained compliance with the minimum bid price requirement as set forth in Nasdaq’s Listing Rule 5550(a)(2).
  • Nasdaq noted that since Sept. 11, 2024, Allarity’s stock has maintained a closing bid price of $1.00 or more for 20 consecutive trading days, thereby meeting the requirements for regaining compliance with the Bid Price Rule.
